title: clutia pedicellaris
intro: Clutia pedicellaris, also known as the yellow fruit bush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clutia pedicellaris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Clutia pedicellaris can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
